objective: Repair the delivery-governance lifecycle so a prepared batch whose declared terminal target is E0 can accept that exact result directly to done without weakening any non-terminal transition.
claim_ceiling: Preparation only: freeze the Local/CI transition corpus, exact activation base, and independent reviewer for a future D10 E0 validator repair. No checker code, test assertion, accepted rung, issue closure, D9/D4/D8 change, source, credential, database, object-store, scheduler, runtime, release, consumer, or Production data claim occurs in this revision.

requirements: the queued registration is merged on main before a preparation revision pins the activation base, independent reviewer, and frozen Local/CI corpus
the implementation permits prepared-to-done only when the base target is the declared terminal E0 and the candidate accepts exactly that E0
prepared E1+ batches and malformed, mismatched, or non-terminal E0 candidates remain rejected
the implementation changes no batch manifest other than D10, and no issue state, D9/D4/D8 scope, source, scheduler, runtime, release, consumer, database, or Production data path

later_claim_dependencies: D9 #274 remains prepared until D10 accepts the narrowly corrected E0 terminal transition.
D4 #210 may use an accepted D9 result only for its existing checker-authorized done-to-done corrective terminal rerun; D10 does not authorize that rerun or a D8 implementation.

required_strata: prepared terminal E0 accepts directly to done
prepared non-terminal E0 cannot complete directly
prepared terminal E0 with changed target or invalid accepted rung is rejected
all existing queued, prepared, active, blocked, and done transition restrictions remain intact

source_ceiling: No network source, credential, Vault, database, object-store, scheduler, runtime, release, consumer, or Production data operation is authorized.

release_activation.reason: D10 changes only the offline delivery-governance lifecycle validator and cannot activate a source, runtime, schedule, consumer, release, or data flow.

negative_controls: a prepared non-terminal E0 or any prepared E1+ batch completing directly to done
a terminal E0 candidate whose accepted or target rung differs from the base target
bypassing the one-rung, immutable activation-base, corpus, changed-path, or review requirements
changing D9, D4, D8, issue lifecycle, source policy, scheduler, runtime, release, consumer, database, or Production data authorization

allowed_evidence_readers: issue #278 planning only until a later accepted result names a bounded corrective consumer

invalidation: Changing the transition condition, affected lifecycle states, path authorization, or corpus requires a new prepared revision before implementation.
Any attempt to combine this checker repair with a D9/D4/D8 permission change, source access, scheduler, runtime, release, consumer, database, or data path requires separate authorization.
rollback: Revert only the future D10 lifecycle validator, tests, and E0 evidence; do not mutate D9, D4, D8, issue state, source policy, runtime, release, consumer, database, or historical governance evidence.
